props.description: Optional leading icon component (rendered as `<svelte:component>`). */ icon?: unknown; } export interface MenuSection { /** Optional section heading. */ label?: string; items: MenuItem[]; } </script>  <script lang="ts"> /** Menu — a sidebar navigation organism: a logo header, one or more labelled sections of items (icon + label), and a footer slot. Items are links when given an `href`, otherwise buttons that emit `onSelect`. The active item is marked with `aria-current="page"` and the selection color.  Composed for the desktop/tablet sidebar pattern; themeable via `--ds-menu-*`.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible name for the navigation landmark.
